full_suite.failure_notes: Not rerun: repository tests directly or transitively open the sealed protected-answer files that this lane is forbidden to touch. The earlier reduced attempt is not a substitute and stopped at 1634 passed, 11 failed, 3 skipped with failures not proven pre-existing. The protected-safe focused repair suite passed 76/76.

honest_issues: The exact wide suite remains unexecuted because doing so conflicts with the sealed protected-answer no-touch rule; acceptance item 4 of the original lane remains unmet, so this repair report is PARTIAL despite all 13 review findings being fixed.

A legacy focused test and a transitive reduced-wide-suite ledger test had already byte-read sealed files earlier in the lane. No protected values were scored, tuned against, or used for training, but the access incident remains reportable.
No E-v2 corpus training, GPU run, owner-41 score, or protected-50 score was run. VERIFIED=0 and REGISTERED_NOT_RUN remain binding.
The Cloud Billing proof procedure is statically validated but has not been executed against live billing data in this CPU/no-training lane.
The shared worktree contains extensive unrelated and concurrent changes; this lane did not revert or commit them.
next: Run the same unmodified Track-D repair-review harness. If it accepts the fixes, the manager can include the reviewed artifacts in the exact execution commit; the GPU handoff is runs/lanes/trackD_ev2_design_20260722/VM_RUN_PLAN.md, but do not authorize it until that byte preflight and the unresolved protected/wide-suite policy are handled.
